capabilities_used.evidence: 这是他最核心的框架。2024-01-31 连发："Rates unchanged  FOMC statement gets a big rewrite"、"Powell gives a hard shove *against* a March cut"；2024-07-31 又用 statement redline 解读："No explicit signal of a September rate cut, but some very meaningful changes in the top of the statement"。配图 3、4 直接是 FOMC 声明逐字 redline。

他持续把利率路径、收益率和流动性环境当作风险资产上层约束。2024-09-30："Interest rates can move ‘over time’ to a ‘more neutral stance’"；2024-09-23/09-30 多次围绕降息路径、neutral rate、mortgage rates、financial conditions 展开。不是看单根K线，而是看收益率和政策约束如何改变估值与风险偏好。

虽然不直接画 SPX setup，但他反复用增长、股市、金融条件来定义 risk-on/off。2025-01-31："Given recent economic strength and buoyant stock markets..."；2024-03-29/09-30 多次围绕 soft landing、economy in solid shape、tools to keep labor market and economy strong 讨论风险偏好。
2026-04-11 直接转述 NYT："The futures and spot prices are rarely exactly the same, but the gap between them has grown unusually big"。配图 5 也是现货油价与期货油价严重背离。这不是加密 perp basis，但方法论上就是利用现货/期货错位来识别定价失真与风险传导。

他不常直接做 BTC 图，但会从美元体系和储备货币地位切入 BTC 叙事。2024-11-30："How does this pair with the idea of creating a ‘federal’ bitcoin ‘reserve.’"；配图 1 是 Trump 对 BRICS 去美元化和替代货币的强硬表态。对加密交易而言，这类美元主导权变化会先影响 DXY/宏观流动性框架，再传导到 BTC。

他会明确标记高波动宏观 regime，而不是把所有数据都当趋势延续。2025-03-31："Trump officials still aren’t sure what they’re doing with tariffs this week"；2026-04-10："The oil shock is far worse than the commonly quoted statistics show." 他的叙述里，关税、能源冲击、FOMC 都是需要先降低确定性、再评估传导的波动 regime。

他的方法带有明显的‘等确认’倾向。2025-01-31："If you are concluding that inflation progress has stalled based on the YoY measures, then give it a couple months."；2024-01-31：Powell quote 被他重点放大，强调没有足够 confidence 就不该抢跑降息。迁移到交易上，就是不靠单一数据点逆势抄底/摸顶。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: FOMC Statement Redline Reaction Function
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: FOMC 声明红线差分反应函数
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Compare consecutive FOMC statements word-by-word, rank added/removed phrases by policy significance, and infer whether the reaction function shifted toward easing, tightening, or data dependence.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 逐字比对连续两次 FOMC 声明，按政策含义给删改语句排序，推断联储反应函数是偏宽松、偏紧还是更数据依赖。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 配图 3、4 都是声明 redline；2024-01-31："FOMC statement gets a big rewrite"；2024-07-31："very meaningful changes in the top of the statement"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: CPI/PPI-to-PCE Bridge Nowcast
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: CPI/PPI 映射 PCE 预估
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Translate CPI, PPI, import prices, and category details into a high-probability core PCE estimate before the official release, then judge whether annualized 3m/6m trends are improving or stalling.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用 CPI、PPI、进口价格和分项细节预估核心 PCE，在正式公布前判断 3 个月和 6 个月年化趋势是改善还是停滞。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-28："Based on the CPI + PPI + import prices, inflation forecasters anticipate a very mild core PCE reading"；2024-08-29、2024-10-30、2025-02-28 反复使用同一桥接框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Labor Market Cooling Composite
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 劳动力市场降温综合框架
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use job openings, hiring rate, quits, claims, ECI, wage trackers, and benchmark revisions as a combined labor-state model instead of relying on payroll headlines alone.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 综合职位空缺、招聘率、离职率、失业金申请、ECI、工资追踪和基准修正来判断劳动力市场状态，而不是只看非农标题。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-07-30："Job openings and hiring data point to a labor market that keeps loosening"；2024-08-27 关于 benchmark revision；配图 7、8 也是围绕就业修正与移民结构。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Tariff Pass-Through Scenario Matrix
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map tariff proposals into inflation, growth, and Fed-path scenarios by separating one-off goods-price effects, confidence shocks, and longer-run labor-market slowdown.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把关税方案拆成通胀、增长和联储路径的情景矩阵，区分一次性商品涨价、信心冲击和更长期的就业拖累。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-03-30：Goldman 预计更激进关税将把 core PCE 推到 3.5%；2024-12-27：2018 年关税没造成持续通胀，但压制 sentiment 和 investment。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Data Revision Audit
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track benchmark revisions, GDI/GDP gaps, savings-rate revisions, and methodology quirks to avoid trading off first prints that will later be materially revised.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪基准修正、GDI/GDP 缺口、储蓄率修正和统计口径问题，避免围绕首发数据做出之后会被大幅修正的交易判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-26："A puzzle solved? Gross domestic income was revised up"；2024-09-27：储蓄率被上修 2 个百分点；他非常重视 revisions。

personal_quirks.quote: Ask me in six months. Just kidding. Two ways to think about this.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要被单月数据绑架，先给出至少两套解释框架，再等更多样本确认。

personal_quirks.quote: This is admittedly a bit (OK, very!) in the weeds, but yesterday, the Fed released minutes from the board's discount rate meetings in July.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他愿意深挖制度和操作层细节，认为真正的信息优势常藏在多数人嫌麻烦的角落。

personal_quirks.quote: Jobless claims aren't telling much new about the state of the labor market.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 反对用单一高频指标下结论，必须用多指标交叉验证就业状态。

personal_quirks.quote: The bar to cut in September seems quite low based on everything Powell said at the presser
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 重点不是 headline，而是从措辞、门槛和条件句里反推政策阈值。

personal_quirks.quote: The oil shock is far worse than the commonly quoted statistics show.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 对市场共识数字做二次审计，主动寻找被低估的传导链和统计误差。

unique_traits: 他不是典型依赖 K 线形态的交易员画像，而是把联储声明 redline、通胀桥接测算、就业修正和政策政治化风险当作主交易信号。对加密市场来说，他的 edge 在于更早识别美元、利率、通胀和联储独立性这些上层变量的变化，再把它们映射成 BTC 的宏观约束。相比多数 TA 交易员，他更像“政策文本分析 + 宏观 nowcast + 数据修正审计”的复合型框架。

high_conviction_phrases: The bar to cut in September seems quite low
The oil shock is far worse than the commonly quoted statistics show.
